generated_oml:
instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR sensor for capturing 3D point cloud data of the vehicle environment"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
]

instance IntelD435iDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel D435i Depth Camera for capturing depth and visual data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthCameraDataTransmitted
]

instance VehicleSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring vehicle speed from the vehicle's state sensors"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance VehicleSteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring vehicle steering angle from the vehicle's state sensors"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
    base:desc "Real-time LiDAR point cloud data transmitted via ROS2 and Wi-Fi"
]

instance VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleSpeedSensor
    base:desc "Real-time vehicle speed data transmitted via ROS2 and Wi-Fi"
]

instance SteeringAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleSteeringAngleSensor
    base:desc "Real-time steering angle data transmitted via ROS2 and Wi-Fi"
]

instance ObjectTracksDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR, IntelD435iDepthCamera
    base:desc "Object tracks data transmitted via ROS2 and Wi-Fi"
]

instance DepthCameraDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelD435iDepthCamera
    base:desc "Real-time depth camera data transmitted via ROS2 and Wi-Fi"
]

instance DBSCANPointCloudClusteringModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN algorithm for clustering LiDAR point clouds to identify objects"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Python38
]

instance KalmanFilterObjectTrackingModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman filter for tracking objects using LiDAR and other sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Python38
]

instance ISO15622ACCControlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ISO 15622-compliant Adaptive Cruise Control model for speed adjustment based on lead vehicle distance"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance VehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Vehicle state data including speed, steering angle, and other parameters stored in SQL database"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted, SteeringAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SQLDatabase
]

instance ObjectTracksData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Object tracks data generated from Kalman filter and stored in SQL database"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ObjectTracksDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SQLDatabase
]

instance DepthCameraData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Depth camera data stored in SQL database"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DepthCameraDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SQLDatabase
]

instance ROS2 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Robot Operating System 2 for communication between physical and digital components"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, RemoteManagementService, ThreeDVisualizationService
]

instance Python38 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 for data processing and scripting"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance CPlusPlus : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ for high-performance data processing"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink for point cloud processing and simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance NVIDIAJetpack50 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 for GPU acceleration and system management"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ThreeDVisualizationService
]

instance SQLDatabase : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SQL database for storing vehicle state and object track data"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance ReportGenerationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Human-readable reports for vehicle state and object tracks"
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of vehicle state and object tracks"
]

instance ACCDecisionMakingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "ACC decision-making for speed adjustment based on lead vehicle distance"
]

instance EnvironmentVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "3D visualization of vehicle environment"
]

instance DataSavingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Save vehicle state and object track data to database"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ACCComputationOffloadAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Offload ACC computations to remote resources"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance EnableACCCmdAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enable ACC system remotely"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DisableACCCmdAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Disable ACC system remotely"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SetDesiredSpeedAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Set desired speed for ACC system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Trigger emergency braking"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for real-time data monitoring, visualization, and saving of vehicle state and object tracks"
    DTDFVocab:provides ReportGenerationInsight, RealTimeVisualizationInsight, DataSavingAction
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for offloading ACC system computations to remote resources"
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCComputationOffloadAction
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for remote management of ACC system including enabling/disabling, setting desired speed, and emergency braking"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableACCCmdAction, DisableACCCmdAction, SetDesiredSpeedAction, EmergencyBrakingAction
]

instance ThreeDVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for 3D visualization of vehicle environment based on sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnvironmentVisualizationInsight
]

instance VedderElectronicSpeedController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Vedder Electronic Speed Controller for motor actuation"
]

instance SteeringServo : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering servo for vehicle steering control"
]

instance NVIDIAJetsonNX : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetson NX computing module for autonomous vehicle processing"
]

instance NVIDIAJetsonOrinNano : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano computing module for autonomous vehicle processing"
]

instance TraxxasSlash4x4AutonomousVehicle : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "1/10-scale autonomous vehicle based on Traxxas Slash 4x4 Premium retrofit with autonomy components"
    base:contains NVIDIAJetsonNX, NVIDIAJetsonOrinNano, HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR, IntelD435iDepthCamera, VedderElectronicSpeedController, SteeringServo, VehicleSpeedSensor, VehicleSteeringAngleSensor
]

instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity for managing physical components and data transmission"
    base:contains HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR, IntelD435iDepthCamera, VehicleSpeedSensor, VehicleSteeringAngleSensor, VedderElectronicSpeedController, SteeringServo
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Digital Twin Entity for processing and modeling virtual data"
]

instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "User Entity for human interaction and remote management"
]

instance CrossSystemEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Cross-System Entity for integration with other systems"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Transmission of ACC control commands (desired speed, emergency braking) and steering commands to the vehicle's motor and steering servo."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time operation with end-to-end latency of at most 100 ms and clock synchronization accuracy of 100 ms."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Entity-based structure with Physical Twin Entity (sensors, actuators), Digital Twin Entity (data processing, ACC), User Entity (visualization, control), and Cross-System Data Translation FE; communication via ROS2 and Wi-Fi."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Design phase (cyber-physical experimentation), validation of requirements, and operational phase for monitoring and optimization."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "ROS2 network for intra-entity communication, Wi-Fi for inter-entity communication with ≤100 ms latency."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Physical Twin components on NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano (vehicle), Digital Twin Entity and User Entity deployed on external hardware (cloud or separate system), Data Storage external to vehicle."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 reference architecture for digital twin framework and ISO 15622 for ACC control strategy."
]
